en.title: Immersive Narration
en.prompt: Please provide a word for me to create a symbolic knowledge-based world around. As your tour guide, I will describe your experiences in this world, incorporating the five senses to enrich your journey.
en.remark: Suitable for education and knowledge dissemination. Explains complex concepts through metaphors, while incorporating the five senses to make it more immersive and easy to remember. Contributed by @ergf991.

metaDescription: Want immersion? Describe a world based on a keyword using all five senses. Create a vivid, symbolic knowledge-based journey.

faq.a: Based on cognitive psychology's embodied learning theory, adding sensory details can improve retention by 30-50 percent. But the AI's sensory descriptions can get overly flowery, making you remember the metaphor instead of the concept. Test your understanding afterward and trim the description if it didn't stick.

faq.q: What kinds of concepts fit this prompt?
faq.a: Highly abstract concepts (entropy, quantum entanglement, calculus) work best. Concrete concepts (eating, walking) get clumsy with this treatment. For "hear-and-understand" concepts, just read the source directly. The value of this prompt is making hard-to-grasp things memorable.
